purpose: Single machine-readable source for Codex execution guardrails, task status, blockers, and closure ownership.

scopeBoundary.runtimeDefinition: Everything under repository root except .claude, .codex, Xuanzhi-Dev
scopeBoundary.hardRule: Codex-only constraints must stay in .codex or Xuanzhi-Dev and must not be written into runtime system layers.

guards.name: Path guard before write
guards.rule: Root new file write, test path out of Xuanzhi-Dev/testing, or empty new file is a hard failure.

guards.name: Verification guard
guards.rule: Smoke-only evidence cannot mark a task completed.
guards.passCondition: if smoke marker exists then real execution evidence marker must exist

guards.name: Report guard
guards.rule: Closeout report must include 功能影响 + 验证证据 + 未完成项.

guards.name: Production foundation guard
guards.rule: Daily-user production ownership and agent/workflow/skill contracts must stay aligned and machine-readable.

guards.name: Codex session foundation guard
guards.rule: .codex bootstrap files, native tasklist, and foundation audit must stay aligned so lower-context models cannot skip required startup and status-sync steps.

statusControl.syncPolicy: Audit status must mirror native-tasklist guard/task state at session checkpoints.
statusControl.hardRule: Do not mark completed in audit if corresponding native-tasklist task remains in_progress/blocked.

blockers.impact: Review payload could fail schema validation and break automated closure.
blockers.resolution: workspace-critic/docs/review-decision-template.json status enum is aligned to pending/approved/rejected/needs_changes and no mapping gap remains.

blockers.impact: Review outputs could diverge because profile source of truth was unclear.
blockers.resolution: workspace-critic/docs/review-checklist.md now pins profile review to state/users/index.json and rejects ad-hoc workspace profile copies.

tasks.title: create-daily-user real replay and closure validation
tasks.definitionOfDone: Daily user creation path writes complete state, bindings, review, and audit chain with traceable closure.
verificationPlan: Validate state/users, state/agents, openclaw bindings, review-gate, user-provision artifacts end-to-end.
Confirm pending_review to terminal state closure path is reachable.

tasks.title: codex execution hard guardrails
tasks.definitionOfDone: Three hard guards are machine-readable and executable before/after implementation.
verificationPlan: Run validate-execution-guardrails.ps1 without report and expect pass.
Run validate-execution-guardrails.ps1 with report sample and check missing-section detection.

tasks.title: native tasklist schema + validator
tasks.definitionOfDone: Native tasklist has schema, validator, and session bootstrap integration.

tasks.title: cleanup runtime empty placeholder directories
tasks.definitionOfDone: Delete non-required empty runtime directories while preserving structural required empty dirs.
verificationPlan: Run cleanup-empty-runtime-dirs.ps1 dry-run and confirm deletable list is empty.

tasks.title: expand foundation validator to create/apply chains and routing mirror drift checks
tasks.definitionOfDone: Foundation validator enforces workflow-owner registration, skill contract/review paths, create/apply chain contracts, and routing mirror alignment.

tasks.title: resolve critic template enum/profile-source blockers in foundation audit
tasks.definitionOfDone: BLK-CRITIC-001/002 are closed with explicit machine-readable resolution notes and reviewer checklist consistency.
verificationPlan: Check workspace-critic/docs/review-checklist.md declares state/users/index.json as profile source of truth.

tasks.title: make .codex bootstrap and status-sync rules machine-readable for low-context sessions
tasks.definitionOfDone: .codex startup order, hard-guard validator set, and codex task state mirroring are enforced by a dedicated validator and referenced from every startup entrypoint.
verificationPlan: Run validate-native-tasklist.ps1 -AsJson and expect the new blocking guard to be present.
Confirm README/session-state/handoff all direct new sessions through SESSION-HARD-GUARDS, native-tasklist, and foundation audit.

runtimeBoundaryAudit.scanRule: Scan runtime scope only (exclude .claude/.codex/Xuanzhi-Dev) for dev-script coupling and codex-only contamination.
runtimeBoundaryAudit.note: Runtime references to Xuanzhi-Dev testing scripts were removed from workflow checks.

archive.reason: Full-file refactor to native machine-readable structure while preserving historical narrative.
archive.compressionNote: The current file is an execution-focused index, not a full narrative report.
archive.indexRole: Keep active guards/tasks/blockers machine-readable and small for fast session boot.
